stats.title: Reading Statistics
stats.subtitle: See your reading across today, this week, this month, this year, and all time
stats.chartDesc: Reading time distribution over the selected period
stats.heatmapDesc: Your reading activity over the past year
stats.trendDesc: Reading time trend over the past 30 days
stats.noBooksInPeriod: No reading records in this period
stats.noData: Start reading to see your stats!

desktop.pageSubtitle: See your reading across today, this week, this month, this year, and all time in one place.
desktop.periodNavigationHint: Move between periods or jump directly with the date picker.
desktop.journeySubtitle: From your first session to today, the time, books, and rhythm you've built live here.
desktop.readingCalendarDesc: Book covers appear directly on the days you actually read them this month.
desktop.primaryChartDesc: Each period emphasizes a different rhythm of time and focus.
desktop.readingHeatmapDesc: A month-at-a-glance heat layer that makes your most immersive reading days stand out immediately.
desktop.singlePointDesc: This period only has one data point so far, so the key number takes center stage.
desktop.topBooksDesc: Ranked by reading time in the selected period.
desktop.insightsDesc: Patterns, consistency, and standout focus moments from this period.
desktop.rhythmProfileDesc: See when you like to read and what kinds of books keep pulling you back in.
desktop.timeOfDayDesc: Your strongest reading windows gradually turn into a recognizable rhythm over time.
desktop.categoryDistributionDesc: A quick view of where your reading time goes by tag or subject.
desktop.annualShelfDesc: A compact strip of recent years so your long-term reading story feels like a real almanac.
desktop.milestonesDesc: All-time view adds memorable moments along your full reading journey.
desktop.sharePreviewDesc: Generate a badge poster you can share or save locally.
desktop.noDataTitle: No reading activity in this period yet
desktop.noDataDesc: Read a little and this page will begin to tell a much richer story.
desktop.noTopBooks: No standout books in this period yet.
desktop.noInsights: Once you read more, this panel will start surfacing patterns.
desktop.noTimeline: An hourly timeline comes next. For now, here's the daily snapshot.
desktop.daySummaryDesc: A quick read on today's cadence and focus window.
desktop.companionMessage: ReadAny has been with you for
desktop.journeyNarrative: ReadAny has been with you for {{days}} days, quietly keeping track of every reading session, every long focus stretch, and every book you stayed with.
desktop.heroNarrativeDay: You spent {{time}} reading today across {{sessions}} sessions.
desktop.heroNarrativeWeek: You kept a reading rhythm on {{days}} days this week, with your longest focus stretch reaching {{longest}}.
desktop.heroNarrativeMonth: This month has already turned {{time}} into reading time across at least {{books}} books.
desktop.heroNarrativeYear: So far this year, you've already given {{time}} to reading, across {{activeDays}} active reading days.
desktop.heroNarrativeLifetime: Since {{date}}, reading has slowly become part of your long-term rhythm.
desktop.insightBodyNoReading: Read a little and this view will quickly begin to show your rhythm, focus, and preferences.
desktop.insightTitleStreak: A reading streak is taking shape
desktop.insightBodyStreak: You kept reading for {{days}} consecutive days in this period.
desktop.insightTitleFocus: A deep focus session showed up
desktop.insightBodyFocus: Your longest reading session reached {{minutes}} minutes.
desktop.insightBodyTopBook: "{{title}}" was the book you spent the most time with in this period.
desktop.milestoneBodyJoined: You started tracking your reading with ReadAny on {{date}}.
desktop.goalsDesc: Set targets and track your progress toward them.
desktop.goalsDescMonthly: Set and track the goals for this month.
desktop.goalsDescYearly: Set and track your reading goals for this year.
desktop.noGoals: No goals set yet. Tap "Set goal" to get started.
desktop.streakAtRiskBody: Keep the flame alive — even a few minutes of reading counts.
desktop.badgesDesc: Milestones unlocked through your reading journey.
desktop.noBadges: Keep reading to earn your first badge!
desktop.badgeSaveSuccessDesc: Your badge poster has been saved to the photo library.
desktop.badgeSavePermissionDenied: Photo library permission is required to save the poster.
desktop.badge_notes-1_desc: Made your first highlight or note
desktop.badge_early-bird_desc: Over half your reading happens before 8am
desktop.badge_night-owl_desc: Over half your reading happens after 10pm
desktop.badge_weekend-warrior_desc: Over 70% of your reading days are weekends
desktop.badge_perfect-week_desc: Read every day for an entire week
